nodes.label: Pick Retailer Screen (S3) — New Order Step 1
nodes.description: Mobile screen for a salesperson to pick a retailer (shop) when starting a new order. Step 1 of 3 in the new-order flow. Shows five interaction states: S3-a default recents list, S3-b live search with substring match, S3-c no-results exit into quick-add, S3-d quick-add new shop form (flagged NEW/pending-verification), S3-e resume-draft bottom sheet. User role: field salesperson.

nodes.label: Retailer Search Component — Live Substring Match
nodes.description: Search bar filtering shops by name + area. Case/space-insensitive, matched substring highlighted. Recents section shown first (covers ~90% of picks). 60px tall rows showing name + area only. No result found automatically exits into quick-add with typed text carried over.

nodes.label: Quick-Add New Shop Form (S3-d)
nodes.description: Form for adding an unrecognised shop on the fly. Fields: Shop name (required, pre-filled from search), Area, Phone (numeric keyboard). Saved as NEW — pending office verification. Order can proceed immediately. CTA: 'Add & start order'. Only name is required — minimises friction while shopkeeper waits.

nodes.label: Resume Draft Order Bottom Sheet (S3-e)
nodes.description: Bottom sheet prompt shown when a local draft is found for the selected shop. Shows draft summary: item count, total (₹4,478), time saved (11:31 on this phone). CTAs: 'Continue order' or 'Start fresh'. Drafts autosave on every tap, live only on this device. Start fresh explicitly discards — never silently.

edges.source_location: S3-c annotation: 'No results — exits into quick-add'
S3-e: shown after selecting a shop that has a saved draft
S3-d annotation: 'quick-add — flagged NEW; order proceeds'
